title: Field Topology Infrastructure

module_descriptions.RGE_Field_Node.py: Mutable dataclass representing a structural node in the recursion field topology. Holds node_id, a list of assigned packet IDs, and free-form metadata.
module_descriptions.RGE_Field_Topology.py: Container class managing a dict-backed collection of RGEFieldNode instances. Provides create_node, get_node, and all_nodes accessors.
module_descriptions.RGE_Topology_Bridge.py: Connects RGEPacketRegistry with RGEFieldTopology. assign_packet_to_node validates packet existence, auto-creates missing nodes, and enforces idempotent packet-ID assignment.

design_decisions: RGEFieldNode uses @dataclass (NOT frozen) to allow mutable packets list accumulation post-creation.
RGEFieldTopology auto-creates nodes on first access; callers may also call create_node explicitly.
RGETopologyBridge.assign_packet_to_node is idempotent — repeated calls with the same (packet_id, node_id) do not duplicate entries.
ValueError raised immediately when packet_id is absent from registry; no silent no-op.
